remarks: Downtown Living, Simplified & Smart: Turnkey Corner Condo at 140 Grove St. A convenient home and high-quality investment. Experience the perfect blend of quiet corner living and downtown vibrancy in this meticulously renovated condo. Situated in one of Stamford's most stable and exceptionally well-managed communities, Unit 2H offers a turnkey opportunity for first-time buyers looking for a "move-in ready" lifestyle or investors seeking a high-demand rental asset. Enjoy the extra privacy or a corner location, abundant natural light, and high-quality flooring throughout. Completely move-in ready with an updated bathroom, a spacious bedroom, and a new kitchen with modern finishes. Forget juggling multiple utility bills-Heat, Hot Water, and Gas are all included in the monthly common charges. Located in the heart of downtown Stamford. Enjoy a short stroll to vibrant parks, Bedford Street's dining scene, and premier shopping. Commuters will love being minutes from I-95 and the Stamford Metro-North station. Includes a deeded parking space (a premium in downtown) with additional parking options available. The unit also boasts ample closet space and on-site laundry facilities on the first level. Stop paying rent and start building equity, or you might want a low-maintenance addition to your investment portfolio. High-end updates, a desirable corner layout, and a "walk-to-everything" score make this one of the best values in Stamford.
